name: ai-agent
description: Nop AI Agent: prompt engineering, architecture design, and ai-ops source code

commands.test: cd .. && mvn test -pl nop-ai/nop-ai-core -am -q 2>/dev/null || echo 'no tests configured yet'
commands.build: cd .. && mvn compile -pl nop-ai/nop-ai-core -am -q 2>/dev/null || echo 'no build configured yet'
